helpful: The statpack supplied calibrated cert, relist, CVSG, and circuit priors.

gaps: A genuinely pre-disposition snapshot was needed; the supplied forward snapshot contained the realized grant and merits outcome.

notes: No live retrieval was needed. The snapshot contamination was the principal limitation.
